connectorUiConfig.title: NordStellar (Push)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The [NordStellar](https://nordstellar.com) connector pushes real-time threat intelligence and exposure events from the NordStellar platform into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) Push pattern. All event types are routed to a single unified `NordStellar_CL` table with common columns (`EventId`, `EventType`, `Module`, `RiskLevel`, `AssetType`, `AssetValue`, `Tags`) extracted by the DCR's KQL transform, while type-specific payload is preserved in a dynamic `Details` column.

**Supported event types (NordStellar `EventTypeV2`):**

- **Leaked Data** (`module: LEAKED_DATA`): `DATA_BREACH`, `COMBO_LIST`, `MALWARE_INFECTION`
- **Dark Web Monitoring** (`module: DARK_WEB_MONITORING`): `DARK_WEB_FORUM_POST`, `DARK_WEB_TELEGRAM_POST`, `DARK_WEB_RANSOMWARE_POST`, `DARK_WEB_MARKETPLACE_POST`
- **Domain Squatting** (`module: DOMAIN_SQUATTING`): `DOMAIN_PERMUTATION`
- **Attack Surface** (`module: ATTACK_SURFACE`): `ATTACK_SURFACE_WEB_APPLICATION_VULNERABILITY`, `ATTACK_SURFACE_NETWORK_SERVICE_VULNERABILITY`, `ATTACK_SURFACE_DNS_VULNERABILITY`

sampleQueries.query:
NordStellar_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where RiskLevel in ("CRITICAL", "HIGH")
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, RiskLevel, AssetType, AssetValue
| order by TimeGenerated desc

NordStellar_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize count() by EventType
| order by count_ desc

NordStellar_CL
| where EventType startswith "ATTACK_SURFACE_"
| extend Cvss3 = todouble(Details.cvss3_score), Cve = tostring(Details.cve_id), Title = tostring(Details.title)
| where Cvss3 >= 7
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, RiskLevel, AssetValue, Title, Cve, Cvss3
| order by Cvss3 desc

NordStellar_CL
| where EventType == "MALWARE_INFECTION"
| extend Stealer = tostring(Details.stealer_name)
| summarize count() by Stealer
| order by count_ desc

NordStellar_CL
| where EventType == "DOMAIN_PERMUTATION"
| project TimeGenerated, RiskLevel, OriginalDomain = tostring(Details.original_domain), PermutedDomain = tostring(Details.domain), PermutationType = tostring(Details.permutation_type)
| order by TimeGenerated desc

dataTypes.name: NordStellar_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
NordStellar_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

value:
NordStellar_CL
| summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
| project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(7d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: Microsoft Entra
customs.description: Permission to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Typically requires Entra ID Application Developer role or higher.

customs.name: Microsoft Azure
customs.description: Permission to assign Monitoring Metrics Publisher role on data collection rule (DCR). Typically requires Azure RBAC Owner or User Access Administrator role.

customs.name: NordStellar
customs.description: Active NordStellar tenant with permission to configure outbound webhooks for the integration.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Deploy connector resources
instructionSteps.description: This connector enables NordStellar to push real-time threat intelligence and exposure events directly to Microsoft Sentinel via the Azure Monitor Ingestion API.

parameters.content:
#### Automated configuration
Clicking **Deploy** will create:
- A custom Log Analytics table `NordStellar_CL`
- A Data Collection Rule (DCR) with a single stream `Custom-NordStellar` and a KQL transform that promotes common fields and preserves the type-specific payload in `Details`
- The Data Collection Endpoint (DCE) used for ingestion
- A Microsoft Entra application with OAuth 2.0 client credentials
- The required `Monitoring Metrics Publisher` role assignment on the DCR

The credentials returned below are then configured in the NordStellar portal so events can be pushed securely.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure NordStellar
instructionSteps.description: Use the following parameters to configure the Microsoft Sentinel integration in the NordStellar portal.

parameters.label: Application (Client) ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Application ID

parameters.label: Client Secret
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the Client Secret

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint URI
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the DCE Endpoint

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule Immutable ID
parameters.placeholder: Deploy push connector to get the DCR Immutable ID

instructionSteps.title: 3. Verify data ingestion
instructionSteps.description: Confirm events are flowing from NordStellar to Sentinel.

parameters.content:
Wait 5-10 minutes after enabling the integration, then run this KQL query in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace:

```kql
NordStellar_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize count() by EventType, Module
| order by count_ desc
```

If no data appears after 15 minutes, verify the credentials in the NordStellar portal and check Azure Monitor for ingestion errors on the DCR.
